central_finding.clean_vs_s20: s20 OOS_CONFIRMED on the s18+s19 UNION (which included the known-OOS-good s18 basket -> sample-size demo, weak generalization evidence). s21 is the clean version: fresh names, no selection bias -> genuine independent generalization.
central_finding.edge_strength_honest: Per-trade OOS edge +$170.96 is LOWER than s20's +$353 and s19's +$336 (the fresh basket's edge is more modest) but solidly positive and survives IS + cost-stress + 5/5 K13 + OOS. A real, portable, but modest premium.
central_finding.headline: s21 PASSES the full ladder (OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC) on a FRESH 48-name universe with ZERO overlap vs s17/s18/s19 -- the CLEAN generalization test. 0/48 names were ever backtested under this mechanic, so there is NO selection bias: the s18/s20 weekly RS edge GENERALIZES to a genuinely fresh universe. This RESOLVES the s20 selection caveat.
central_finding.oos_economics: OOS net +$48,474.92, expectancy +$170.96/trade, sharpe +0.144, win 58.48%, PF 1.51, maxDD 19.30%, +48.47%; 171 closed (85.8/y, clears K9 with the largest margin of the line); DR1/K9/DR4 all clear.

diagnostic_only_disclosure: DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY; NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, NOT FRC-granted. Trading PAUSED; Live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED. OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC is a research-phase label, NOT a promotion.
does_s21_cleanly_generalize_the_s18_s20_: YES. s21 is the clean independent generalization test (fresh 48-name universe, 0/48 ever backtested, identical byte-locked mechanic) and it OOS_CONFIRMED (171/85.8y, +$48,475, exp +$171/trade, 5/5 K13). This resolves the s20 selection caveat: the s18/s20 weekly RS edge generalizes on genuinely unseen names, not just baskets containing known winners. The edge is real and portable (though modest per-trade). Still DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY.
inherited_constraints_block_VERBATIM_FRO: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades>=100 total; OOS>=50/y; no relaxation. Pre-SEAL K9 turnover MEASURED (signal-only, no P&L, fresh 48-name universe) PASSES: IS aggregate 310; OOS 171 (85.8/y) CLEARS the floor; per-fold F1-F5 97/87/83/100/112 (agg 479).

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-ref 52a3b60): >=3/5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds positive + aggregate net>0 + K9; P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Folds LOCKED at DA22.

FRESH s21 CANDIDATE (NOT a tune/_revN_ of s18/s19/s20): mechanic byte-identical to the s18/s19/s20 weekly spec; the ONLY change is the universe (fresh 48-name, zero overlap with s17/s18/s19). s18 (7e6aa36) / s19 (a3aed99) / s20 (e9ec72f) frozen/untouched. M=8 unchanged.

EDGE NOT INHERITED: the fresh-basket edge MUST be re-proven from scratch at s21 P6 IS (K1 sharpe>0 AND K2 expectancy>0), P6.7 K13, and P10 OOS. A null/negative result = accepted, informative (the weekly RS edge is partly universe-specific).

CLEAN-GENERALIZATION (BINDING; resolves the s20 selection caveat): the s21 basket has 0/48 names ever backtested under this mechanic -> a positive s21 IS/OOS is GENUINE independent generalization evidence (no selection bias, unlike s20's union which included the known-OOS-good s18 basket). Honest residual: names pre-committed in the RUN_BOOK (dd69414) by liquidity/sector-spread/listing-history, NEVER by performance; no look-ahead.

PURPOSE = CLEAN GENERALIZATION: the breadth-solves-OOS-K9 mechanism was proven in s20 (LESSON_S20_D1_001) and pre-SEAL MEASURED to GENERALIZE here (OOS 171/85.8y on fresh names, even higher than s20's 67.2/y). The open binding question is whether the EDGE (P&L) survives on fresh names -- tested at P6 IS / P6.7 / P10.
RELATIVE-STRENGTH-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): weekly cadence; 126-21 ranking signal; top-8 equal-weight; relative-rank exit (no trailing/ATR stop). Identical to s18/s19/s20.
Params L=126 / S=21 / M=8 / R=5(weekly) LOCKED byte-equivalent (identical to s18/s19/s20; NOT tuned, NOT searched). M held at 8 -> breadth from universe size alone.
DA3 equal-weight 1/M; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).

DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-ref 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal. Cost_drag projected ~1-3% (s20 measured 1.03% at this breadth); turnover branch true; DR10-v2 binding at P6.5; expected clear with narrower-but-adequate margin.
split_only CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse the DR9-passed FRESH CSVs (d76c999); switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN; AVGO 10:1 (2024-07-15) + all Tiingo splitFactors applied+verified; dividends not adjusted.
FRESH 48-name universe LOCKED (zero overlap with s17/s18/s19); widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).

DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 48 by sealed result d76c999 (result_seal 9835c0d2a21f40eb); calendar-aligned 1759 bars; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent; sha-verified all 48 at the DRAFT measurement.
A7 + K10 + K6 LOAD-BEARING (top-8 of 48 -> broad sector spread); NOT the risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).

no_strategy_optimization_authorized: byte-locked s18/s19/s20 params, NOT grid-searched/tuned; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched; no cadence-tuning; no held-N change; no universe performance-selection.

weekly_rs_line_summary.net_read: The weekly RS cross-sectional momentum edge is REAL, PORTABLE, and GENERALIZES cleanly to fresh names; its recurring OOS-sample blocker is solvable by breadth WITHOUT tuning. The edge is modest per-trade and DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY -- there is NO live path by framework design.

weekly_rs_line_summary.s20_combined_48name: OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC (134/67.2y; breadth solves K9; selection-biased -> sample-size demo)
weekly_rs_line_summary.s21_fresh_48name: OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC (171/85.8y; CLEAN -- fresh never-tested universe; no selection bias)

what_s21_demonstrates: The weekly RS edge (126-21 / R=5 / top-8 / relative-rank exit) is a GENERALIZING cross-sectional premium: it OOS-confirms on a fresh 48-name universe never seen by the mechanic, not just on baskets containing known winners.
The breadth-solves-OOS-K9 mechanism (LESSON_S20_D1_001) holds on fresh names: 48-name pool at M=8 -> OOS 85.8/y, clearing K9 with the largest margin yet.

Across the line: s18 OOS_CONFIRMED (24-name, recent-fold weak); s19 edge-generalized-but-K9-terminal (independent 24-name); s20 OOS_CONFIRMED (combined 48, breadth solves K9 but selection-biased); s21 OOS_CONFIRMED CLEAN (fresh 48, no selection bias). The edge is real and portable.
what_s21_does_NOT_demonstrate: It does NOT demonstrate live/paper readiness or money-proven performance.
It does NOT warrant promotion/Strategy-Lab/broker/FRC -- all remain permanently blocked.
It does NOT prove a LARGE edge -- the fresh-universe per-trade edge (+$171) is modest; generalization != magnitude.
It does NOT license tuning M/cadence/universe -- M=8 held fixed; the universe was pre-committed.
